meaning: n.投掷,铸件,脱落物,一瞥,演员表v.投,抛,投射,浇铸,计算,派(角色)
examples: The play has a very strong cast.
The moon's pale light cast soft shadows.
The party lost its deposit, having secured less than 5% of the total votes cast.
Our ten-member Honor Roll of 2005 has a familiar cast, with six holdovers from last year.
